title: Bridge Essay: Ecstatic or Mystical Experience through Epilepsy.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.

**Ecstatic or Mystical Experience through Epilepsy.**. J Cogn Neurosci.. PMID: 37432752. DOI: 10.1162/jocn_a_02031. Ecstatic epilepsy is arare form of focal epilepsy, so named because the seizures' first symptoms consist of an ecstatic/mystical experience, including feelings of increased self-awareness, mental clarity, and "unity with everything that exists," accompanied by asense of bliss and physical well-being.
